bricks.blueprint_yaml:
name: count_less_than_ten
description: DSL-generated pipeline with 3 steps
inputs:
  values: Any
steps:
- name: step_1_for_each
  brick: __for_each__
  params:
    items: ${inputs.values}
    do_brick: compare_values
    item_kwarg: a
    static_kwargs:
      b: 10
      operator: lt
    on_error: fail
  save_as: step_1_for_each
- name: step_2_filter_dict_list
  brick: filter_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_1_for_each.result}
    key: result
    value: true
  save_as: step_2_filter_dict_list
- name: step_3_count_dict_list
  brick: count_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_2_filter_dict_list.result}
  save_as: step_3_count_dict_list
outputs_map:
  count: ${step_3_count_dict_list.result}
bricks_log_signals: bricks.ai.composer INFO Composing blueprint for task (107 chars), 102 bricks in pool
